---
title: "README"
author: "Me"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Human Activity Recognition Data Cleaning

This project prepares a tidy dataset from the Human Activity Recognition Using Smartphones dataset. The goal is to clean, label, and summarize accelerometer data for further analysis.

## Data Source

The data comes from the UCI Machine Learning Repository:

<https://d396qusza40orc.cloudfront.net/getdata%2Fprojectfiles%2FUCI%20HAR%20Dataset.zip>

A full description is available at the site where the data was obtained:

<http://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/datasets/Human+Activity+Recognition+Using+Smartphones>

## Files Used 

- "features.txt": List of all features\
- "activity_labels.txt": mapping between activity IDs and activity names
- train/ and test/ datasets:
  - "subject_test.txt": Each row identifies the subject who performed the activity for each window sample. Its range is from 1 to 30.\
  - "X_test.txt": measurements\
  - "Y_test.txt": activity IDs

## Processing Steps

The script run_analysis.R performs the following:\

1. Loads all the needed data from the "UCI HAR Dataset" folder\
2. Merges them into a single dataset \
3. Extracts only the mean and standard deviation for each measurement\
4. Applies descriptive variable names\
5. Replaces activity IDs with descriptive activity names\
6. Combines subject, activity and measurement data\
7. Creates a summary dataset with the average of each variable for each activity and each subject.

## Output

The result of steps 1-6 can be found in the "measurementData.txt" file.\
The result of step 7 can be found in the "measurementSummary.txt" file.

## How To Run

1. Download and unzip the dataset into the working directory
2. In R run source("run_analysis.R")
